title: conyza dongolensis
intro: Conyza dongolensis, also known as Egyptian lavender or Egyptian bugloss, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have antimalarial and antihelmintic properties, providing relief from fever, headaches, and parasites. Conyza dongolensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat a range of health issues, and can also be used topically as an ointment or cream.
